trades.reasoning: Score 95 with RSI 65.9 in the ideal momentum zone, MACD bullish crossover with rising histogram, and price 8.3% above SMA-20 — healthcare tech with strong trend and affordable entry deploys idle cash into a high-conviction setup.

Score 95 defense-tech name with RSI 57.8 (more upside runway than peers), MACD bullish, and price above SMA-20 — defense spending tailwinds provide a differentiated sector exposure to diversify the portfolio.

decisions.briefing: Markets drifted modestly higher today with the S&P 500 up 0.5% and NASDAQ up 0.2% — a quiet, constructive session with no major risk-off signals. With 4 open slots and over $1,300 in idle cash, the rules strongly favour deploying capital, so I'm initiating two new positions from the top of the screener. OSCR and KTOS both score 95 with clean MACD setups and RSI values well inside the 55–70 momentum sweet spot, avoiding the overbought names (RSI >70) that cluster lower on the list.

market_education.summary_en: U.S. equities edged higher Thursday as investors absorbed a mixed batch of economic data and maintained a cautious but constructive posture ahead of the weekend. The S&P 500 outpaced the NASDAQ, suggesting modest rotation from growth into broader large-cap names. With no major macro shocks, price action was driven largely by sector-level momentum rather than a single macro catalyst.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股週四小幅收高，投資人在消化一系列參差不齊的經濟數據後維持審慎樂觀態度。標普500表現優於那斯達克，顯示資金有從成長股輪動至大型股的跡象。整體盤面缺乏單一宏觀催化劑，個股及板塊動能成為主要驅動力。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Momentum investing means buying stocks that have been trending upward — on the theory that assets rising in price tend to keep rising, at least in the short term. Traders look for signals like RSI in the 55–70 zone (strong but not overbought) and a bullish MACD crossover to confirm the trend is intact. Today's buys in OSCR and KTOS both follow this playbook: enter while momentum is strong but before the RSI flashes an overbought warning.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 動能投資策略是指買入近期持續上漲的股票，其理論基礎在於：價格上升的資產往往會延續漲勢，至少在短期內如此。交易者通常尋找RSI介於55至70之間（強勁但未超買）以及MACD看多交叉等信號，以確認趨勢仍然健在。今日買入OSCR與KTOS正是此策略的體現：在動能強勁、但RSI尚未發出超買警示前進場佈局。
